name: Hillman Solutions Corp.
business: Hillman Solutions Corp. is one of the largest providers of hardware-related products and related merchandising services to retail markets in North America. The company sells fasteners, builders hardware, keys, personal protective equipment, and other hardware items. It operates through three segments: Hardware and Protective Solutions, Robotics and Digital Solutions, and Canada.
sellsTo: retail outlets in the United States, Canada, Mexico, Latin America, and the Caribbean

exposures.sentence: Our Robotics and Digital Solutions segment consists primarily of software-enabled robotic key duplication and engraving solutions that are tailored to the unique needs of the consumer.
In late May 2023, we experienced a ransomware attack relating to certain systems on our network (the Cybersecurity Incident).
Hillman continues to expand its B2B eCommerce platform allowing certain customers to order online through the Company's website, www.hillmangroup.com.

catalysts.event: First phase of new ERP system operationalized
catalysts.sentence: We expect the first phase of this project to be operationalized in mid 2026.
We expect to realize the entire December 27, 2025 backlog during fiscal 2026.
